understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' while avoiding spike tiles that end the run. Complete levels using at most 2 attempts per level, with each attempt having a limit of 50 turns.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Player moves with directional actions (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, etc.) under current gravity direction (DOWN in recent turns). Clicking removes clickable tiles at targeted positions, but repeated clicks on the same tile had no additional effect. Gravity affects movement and positions remain fixed unless moved or falling. Spikes end the run on contact. No undo mechanism was observed.
